title: Matrix Hangman
description: A hangman game inspired by The Matrix movie, featuring a green code rain background and a futuristic design.

description: A tribute website inspired by Coco Chanel and her story.

description: A website that simulates a Magic 8 Ball, allowing users to ask questions and receive random answers.

title: Monthly Website Gallery
description: A website made to showcase the projects I have made each month in my web design class.

description: A website that generates random names based on user inputs.

description: A website dedicated to the New York Knicks, featuring team history, player profiles, and latest news.

title: Postcard Generator
description: A page that allows users to create and customize their select postcards with different backgrounds and styles.

title: President Website
description: A website showcasing the life and achievements of Abraham Lincoln, featuring sections on his early life, political career, and legacy.

description: A template website that was built through tutorials.

description: A game style website that allows users to play rock, paper, scissors against the computer.

title: CSS Ghost Animation
description: A template css ghost that was custom designed and animated individually.

title: CSS Spider Animation
description: A template css spider that was custom designed and animated individually.

title: State Facts
description: A tutorial website that provides facts about different states in the US, including population andcapital city.

description: A website that depicts the attractions of Italy, including popular tourist destinations, traditional cuisine, and cultural events.

title: To-Do List
description: A simple to-do list website that allows users to add, complete, and delete tasks.

title: Wildcard Website
description: We were told to make an interactive website of our choice, so I made a website that features a game where users can play a game of murder mystery.
